table.title: URL by Latency
table.searchString: eventtype=netscaler_appflow httpRequestUrl!="" | eval clientside=(flowEndMicroSeconds - flowStartMicroSeconds)/1000000 | stats avg(clientside) AS "Client Side Round-trip Time" by appID, httpRequestUrl | lookup appid_lookup appID OUTPUT appName | eval appName = if(isnull(appName), appID, appName) | rename appName AS "Server", httpRequestUrl AS "URL" | fields "Server", "URL", "Client Side Round-trip Time"

table.title: HTTP Methods
table.searchString: eventtype=netscaler_appflow | top httpRequestMethod by appID | lookup appid_lookup appID OUTPUT appName | eval appName = if(isnull(appName), appID, appName) | rename appName AS "Server", httpRequestMethod AS "Method", count AS "Count", percent AS "Percentage" | fields "Server", "Method", "Count", "Percentage"

table.title: HTTP Status Codes
table.searchString: eventtype=netscaler_appflow | top httpResponseStatus by appID | lookup appid_lookup appID OUTPUT appName | eval appName = if(isnull(appName), appID, appName) | rename appName AS "Server", httpResponseStatus AS "Status", count AS "Count", percent AS "Percentage" | fields "Server", "Status", "Count", "Percentage"

chart.title: HTTP UserAgents
chart.searchString: eventtype=netscaler_appflow httpUserAgent!="" httpUserAgent!="0" | top limit=10 httpUserAgent
